Also offers Free File fillable forms for those who do not qualify for the service. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Adjusted Gross Income (AGI) $84,000 or less Hours: 24 Hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 265-3501 Get Directions Visit Website More Details METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE MFS CASH OREGON DO-IT-YOURSELF TAX PREP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a list of do-it-yourself tax filing software for federal and state returns. 919 NE 19th Avenue Suite 200 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by tax software provider Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 243-7765 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON FREE FILE METROPOLITAN FAMILY SERVICE DO-IT-YOURSELF TAX PREP
